<0>FlatGeobuf</0> is a compact binary en: ʻO <0>FlatGeobuf</0> kahi hoʻopāpā binary paʻa no ka ʻikepili kikoʻī e pili ana i nā flatbuffers. He ʻano hou kēia i kūpono wale me nā mana hou o ka polokalamu open-source.
<0>Zipped shapefiles</0> are a compresse: <0>Zipped shapefiles</0> he hōʻano binary i hoʻopili ʻia me ka hapa nui o nā lako polokalamu.

GeoJSON is an uncompressed text format c: ʻO GeoJSON kahi ʻano kikokikona i hoʻopaʻa ʻole ʻia me ka hapa nui o nā polokalamu spatial.
GeoTIFF is a public domain metadata stan: ʻO GeoTIFF kahi maʻamau metadata domain ākea e hiki ai ke hoʻokomo i ka ʻike georeferencing i loko o kahi faila TIFF.

PNG is a raster-graphics file-format tha: ʻO PNG kahi hōʻano waihona kiʻi raster e kākoʻo ana i ka hoʻoemi ʻikepili ʻole. ʻAʻohe ona metadata spatial i hoʻopaʻa ʻia i loko o ia mea no laila ʻaʻole pono i ka lako polokalamu spatial.

SeaSketch puts powerful tools into the h:
Hāʻawi ʻo SeaSketch i nā mea hana ikaika i ka lima o nā mea hoʻolālā moana,
              nā mea kuleana a me ka lehulehu i kaupalena ʻia i ka GIS
              ʻoihana, hiki ke komo i ka hoʻolālā spatial moana
              nā kaʻina hana i pili pono i ka ʻepekema pili a
              ʻike. Hoʻohana ʻia ʻo SeaSketch a puni ka honua ma ka liʻiliʻi
              nā hui hui a me nā hana nui i alakaʻi ʻia e ke kaiāulu e hoʻomaikaʻi
              nā hoʻoholo hoʻokele i kēlā me kēia lā.

This data layer is hosted on an ArcGIS v: Hoʻokipa ʻia kēia papa ʻikepili ma kahi lawelawe vector ArcGIS. E unuhi ʻo SeaSketch i nā hiʻohiʻona vector mai ka lawelawe a hoʻihoʻi iā ʻoe ma ke ʻano he faila GeoJSON, hiki ke hoʻohana ʻia i nā polokalamu geospatial hou. Hiki i kēia unuhi ke piʻi i 3 mau hola.
This data source comes from a GeoJSON fi: Loaʻa kēia kumu ʻikepili mai kahi faila GeoJSON ma kahi kikowaena ʻaoʻao 3rd. Kaomi i ka loulou ma lalo nei e hoʻoiho mai ia mai ke kumu kumu.
